# AI contributor instructions

This file intentionally stays thin. Canonical guidance lives in:

1. [`ARCHITECTURE.md`](../ARCHITECTURE.md) — scope, data model, privacy posture, roles. **Read first.**
2. [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) — hard rules for writing code here (no PHI, never bypass RLS, strict TS, feature folders, mobile-first).
3. [`DESIGN.md`](../DESIGN.md) — visual system and component patterns.

If guidance here ever conflicts with those files, those files win.
